auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Sage HR API key sent with the X-Auth-Token header. Enable the API and copy the key from Settings > Integrations > API in Sage HR: https://support.sage.hr/en/articles/3246469-how-does-cakehr-api-work.

extraFields.label: Domain
extraFields.description: Your Sage HR company subdomain. If your portal is acme.sage.hr, enter acme or acme.sage.hr.

actions.name: get_employee
actions.description: Get a single active Sage HR employee by ID.

includeTeamHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include team_history records in employee responses.

includeEmploymentStatusHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include employment_status_history records in employee responses.

includePositionHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include position_history records in employee responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Sage HR active employee.

employee.description: A Sage HR active employee object.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR active employee response.

actions.name: get_terminated_employee
actions.description: Get a single terminated Sage HR employee by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Sage HR terminated employee.

terminatedEmployee.description: A Sage HR terminated employee object.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR terminated employee response.

actions.name: list_employees
actions.description: List active employees in Sage HR with optional pagination and history expansions.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

includeTeamHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include team_history records in employee responses.

includeEmploymentStatusHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include employment_status_history records in employee responses.

includePositionHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include position_history records in employee responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR active employees.

items.description: A Sage HR active employee object.

employees.description: The active employees returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR active employee list response.

actions.name: list_positions
actions.description: List positions in Sage HR with optional pagination.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR positions.

positions.description: The positions returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR position list response.

actions.name: list_teams
actions.description: List teams in Sage HR with optional pagination.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR teams.

teams.description: The teams returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR team list response.

actions.name: list_terminated_employees
actions.description: List terminated employees in Sage HR with optional pagination and history expansions.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

includeTeamHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include team_history records in employee responses.

includeEmploymentStatusHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include employment_status_history records in employee responses.

includePositionHistory.description: Whether Sage HR should include position_history records in employee responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR terminated employees.

items.description: A Sage HR terminated employee object.

terminatedEmployees.description: The terminated employees returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR terminated employee list response.

actions.name: list_termination_reasons
actions.description: List termination reasons configured in Sage HR with optional pagination.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR termination reasons.

items.description: A Sage HR termination reason object.

terminationReasons.description: The termination reasons returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR termination reason list response.

actions.name: list_time_off_requests
actions.description: List Sage HR time off requests with optional date range and pagination filters.

page.description: The Sage HR page number to request.

from.description: Start date for the time off request range. Sage HR expects YYYY-MM-DD; when from and to are both provided, the range must be less than 65 days.

to.description: End date for the time off request range. Sage HR expects YYYY-MM-DD; when from and to are both provided, the range must be less than 65 days.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Sage HR time off requests.

items.description: A Sage HR time off request object.

timeOffRequests.description: The time off requests returned by Sage HR.

meta.description: Pagination metadata returned by Sage HR.

raw.description: The raw Sage HR API response payload.

outputSchema.description: The Sage HR time off request list response.
